headline: Block (SQ) Is Up 19.7% After Massive AI-Led Restructuring And 40% Workforce Cut – What's Changed
summary: In late February 2026, Block, Inc. reported full-year 2025 results showing revenue of US$24.19 billion and net income of US$1.31 billion, alongside plans to cut more than 40% of its workforce as part of a large restructuring tied to artificial intelligence tools. The company expects US$450 million to US$500 million in restructuring charges as it moves toward a smaller, AI-centric operating model that management says is driven by productivity gains rather than financial distress. We’ll now...

headline: Block Shares Jump 15% After Cutting Nearly Half Its Workforce
summary: Jack Dorsey cites AI-driven efficiency as Block announces sweeping layoffs following pandemic-era headcount surge.

content.title: Block Shares Jump 15% After Cutting Nearly Half Its Workforce
content.summary: Jack Dorsey cites AI-driven efficiency as Block announces sweeping layoffs following pandemic-era headcount surge.

headline: Fed races to adapt to AI promises and pitfalls for jobs, inflation
summary: U.S. Federal Reserve officials who have largely accepted that artificial intelligence will lead to dramatic shifts in the economy are now struggling to understand the pace and extent of what's to come, with a divide emerging over its potential to impact the labor market and prices.  The AI transition, though, has raised a different response, with officials ‌saying higher unemployment rates may be par for the course ahead, with displaced workers taking longer to find new jobs and the higher capital returns and wages for those still working keeping upward pressure on inflation.  That group includes Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh, who feels interest rates should fall in part to account for AI-driven productivity gains holding down inflation.

content.title: Fed races to adapt to AI promises and pitfalls for jobs, inflation

That group includes Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh, who feels interest rates should fall in part to account for AI-driven productivity gains holding down inflation.
